full_text:
Gao Sheng 高昇
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gao Sheng (高昇). Yellow Scarf officer. Fought with Liu Bei at Quyang, but was slain by Zhang Fei. Gao Sheng may not have existed in history. Gao Sheng was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Gao Sheng lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
